overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia traversing a scenic grassland trail with mountains in the background. The character ascends a wooden staircase and continues up a rocky path into increasingly dense and shaded woodland terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the flat dirt path through tall grass fields

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
tall green and amber grass flanking the path
tall green and amber grass flanking the path
sparse pine trees dotting the landscape
sparse pine trees dotting the landscape
snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a flat dirt trail through an open grassland with tall vegetation on both sides. The landscape features scattered pine trees and distant snow-capped mountains under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

events.description: path transitions from flat grassland to wooden log staircase

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the wooden stairs up the rocky hillside

entered.detail: rustic log staircase with wooden railings built into the hillside
large mossy rocks flanking the staircase
large mossy rocks flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a wooden log staircase ascending between rocky outcrops. Geralt climbs the stairs as the path becomes more enclosed by rock formations while the distant mountains remain visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky uphill forest trail with dense vegetation

events.description: exiting wooden stairs back to dirt trail with denser surrounding vegetation
trail enters significantly shaded area as tree cover increases

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing uphill on the rocky trail into denser woodland with heavier shadows

entered.detail: uneven dirt trail with embedded stones and rocks
thick bushes and tall grass crowding the path
thick bushes and tall grass crowding the path
prominent boulder formation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: After the stairs, the path continues as a rocky dirt trail uphill through increasingly dense vegetation. The lighting becomes noticeably darker and more diffused as the tree cover thickens, and the distant mountains shift to the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a bright, open grassland gradually transforms into a dense, shaded woodland ascent. It begins with Geralt walking along a flat dirt trail flanked by tall vegetation, with scattered pine trees and snow-capped mountains visible under a bright blue sky. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows him up a wooden log staircase that winds between rocky outcrops, narrowing the field of view while keeping the distant peaks in sight. The scene then opens onto a rocky uphill trail where the vegetation thickens, causing the lighting to become darker and more diffused. Finally, the camera continues the climb into the heavy tree cover as the distant mountains shift toward the right side of the frame.
